     The Numbers Business Report

Downhill (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $8,287,061Details
International Box Office $872,322
Worldwide Box Office $9,159,383
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Barely escaping an avalanche during a ski vacation in the Alps throws a seemingly picture-perfect family into disarray as they are forced to reevaluate life, and how they truly feel about each other.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,622,018 (55.8% of total gross)
Legs:1.79 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:90.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,301 opening theaters/2,311 max. theaters, 2.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $10,796,651

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2020 (Wide) by Searchlight Pictures
International Releases: February 14th, 2020 (Wide), released as Lavina (Lithuania)
February 28th, 2020 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
March 5th, 2020 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 6th, 2020 (Wide) (Australia)
March 6th, 2020 (Wide), released as Yokuş Aşağı (Turkey)
Video Release: March 27th, 2020 by Searchlight Pictures
MPA Rating: R for language and some sexual material.
(Rating bulletin 2608 (Cert #52412), 12/11/2019)
Running Time: 86 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Film festival: Sundance Film Festival 2020
Plot point: Disaster, Dysfunctional Family, Relationships Gone Wrong
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Fox Searchlight Pictures, A Likely Story
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
